name: Panda Adventure
description: Panda Adventure is an exciting and immersive platformer game where players step into the paws of a brave and curious panda on a thrilling journey through vibrant and challenging worlds. Set in beautifully designed environments, the game combines exploration, action, and fun-filled challenges that keep players engaged from start to finish.
instructions: W Arrow Up rarr Move Front S Arrow Down rarr Move Back A Arrow Left rarr Move Left D Arrow Right rarr Move Right - To click any button use mouse
